maxDeliveryRetries.description:
Maximum number of times a delivery attempt is retried after initial delivery attempt failure.

Current default value is:

	* `2` for the old, lifetime-based web-hook subscriptions (will be phased out after the 4th of April, 2026);
	* `0` for the new, credit-based web-hook subscriptions (will be the default value for any web-hook subscription after the 4th of April, 2026).
